###### Primeval Skin
**Trait** Passive  | Cost -
You add your **Tier** to your **armor defense** when not wearing armor, and you **armor** bonus is effected by your **spellcasting modifier** instead of **Body**.

###### Cantrips
**Hunter's Stride**
**Range** Touch  | **Duration** 1 Minute, Focused 
You lay hands in yourself or an ally within range, granting the benefit of a seasoned hunter. For the duration of the spell, target gains +2 to **stealth** checks, and cannot gain **crippled**.

**Primordial Strike**
**Range** Touch | **Duration** Instant
You make a **spell attack roll** using your melee weapon, on a hit deal additional weapon die equal to half your **Tier** (minimum 1). This extra damage can be made any **elemental** damage of your choice. 

**Primeval Lure**
**Range** Close | **Duration** Instant 
Hurl an ethereal tether at a creature you can see. Make a **ranged spell attack** against its **Body**. On a **hit** the target takes 1d6 **elemental** damage and, if its size is **equal to or smaller than yours**, it is pulled one range band straight toward you. On a **critical hit** the pull is doubled.

**Primeval Rebuke**
**Range** Close | **Duration** 1 Minute
You you cloak a willing creature in volatile energy. The next time that creature is **hit by a melee attack** before the aura expires, the attacker suffers **1d6 elemental** damage of the type you chose. The aura then ends.

**Primeval Ward**
**Range** Touch | **Duration** 1 Round
You twist ambient elements to blunt the blow. The target gains **resistance** to the triggering elemental damage, reducing it by an amount equal to your **spellcasting modifier** (min 1). Additional Ward castings before your next turn do not stack.

**Unseen Messenger**
 **Range** Far | **Duration** 1 Round
You dispatch a whispering mote to a creature you have met. It travels unerringly, passing through non-magical barriers. Upon arrival it murmurs a **6 second message** in your voice, audible only to the recipient.

**Volatile Burst**
**Range** Self, *engagement* | **Duration** Instant
You release a pulse of unstable primordial energy. dealing 1d8 **spirit** damage as you cast.

**Wild Hunt** 
**Range** Close | **Duration** Instant
You unleash a pulse of primal awareness. Until the end of your next turn you gain +2 to **Investigation** checks made in your current zone and ignore **Strain** on those checks caused by darkness, foliage, or light cover.

feats.name: Expanded Resonance

- **Critical Resonance** When casting a spell, decrease critical roll by 1 (20 to 19) for 5 **Resonance**. You may repeat this **Resonance** up to 3 times.
- **Fragmented Resonance** When a spell effect only a single target, you may spend up to 3 **Resonance** to select another target. This includes targeting yourself.
- **Graceful Resonance** When you cast a **zone** spell, spend 1 point of **Resonance** per target you wish to exclude from being effected against your spell.
- **Pursuing Resonance** When making a **spell attack** and miss, spend 1 point of **Resonance** per tier of the spell to reroll a d20. Take the new roll.

- **Acute Resonance** When you cast a spell, reroll 1's once when rolling for damage and take the second roll.
- **Reverberating Resonance** When you cast a spell with a duration of focused, you may expend **Resonance** equal to the spell's tier and it will remain until the end of your next turn, allowing you to maintain two focused spells. Whichever spell maintained by this **resonance** fades if not reactivated.
- **Shifting Resonance** When you cast a spell, spend 2 **Resonance** x the spell's **Tier**, and change the size of the effect spell. (Single → Burst (Touch) → Burst(Close) → Wave (1 Zone) → Wave (2 Zone) → etc.)
- **Surging Resonance** When you use a *Decimation* spell, spend 3 **Resonance** and add 2d4 **elemental** damage of choice to damage.

feats.name: Bulwark Maneuver
feats.description_markdown:
You use your body as bastion of defense for warfare. You gain or cause effects based upon the activated **bulwark maneuver**. Chose two from the following five maneuvers:
- **Bulwark Rally** Let the rush of danger be the the reason you and your ally survive. Until the start of your next turn, choose yourself and one ally with your **engagement**, you both gain +1 to **armor** defense.
- **Controlled Blows** You stead your weapon arm to insure your own safety. Until the start of your next turn, you decrease weapon dice size (min. d4) and gain +2 to **armor** defense. 
- **Counter Strike** You brace yourself for impact, and make yourself ready to retaliate against the next melee attack. When a target in your **engagement** would target you with a **melee** attack, you retaliate with a single attack roll until the start of your next turn. Gain +2 to hit if the target's attack is a **critical miss**.
- **Shield Charge** You raise your shield charging head first into the enemy and roll an attack with a **shield bash**. On a **critical hit**, target becomes **dazed** until the end of its turn. Gain +1 to hit if not **engaged** with the target.
- **Weapon Disarm** You snatch or jam an opponent’s weapon. Until the start of your next turn, when a target within your **engagement** makes a **melee weapon** attack against you, before the attack is rolled, make a **body** check against the target's **body** defense. On a **success**, you stop the attack from landing. On a **critical success**, the target's weapon is **dropped** between the two of you.

feats.name: Avowed Nemesis
feats.description_markdown:
As part of your **daily preparation**, you proclaim a vow against your enemies and choose one **Nemesis** for the day based on your **Creed**.  
When you first encounter your chosen **Nemesis**, they become **Marked** for the duration of the encounter.

While a creature is **Marked**:

- They cannot become **hidden** or **unaware** to you.
- You have **Resolve** on checks to **track**, **shove**, or **grapple** them.    
- If they **Dash** or **Disengage**, your next **Dash** or **Disengage** cost 1 AP less.

| Creeds       | Choice of Nemesis                                          |
| ------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Honor**    | *Deathless, Mortals, Monstrosities, Occult*  |
| **Serenity** | *Deathless, Forged, Occult, Wyrms*           |
| **Dominion** | *Monstrosities, Primordial, Wildlife, Wyrms* |
| **Entropy**  | *Eidolic, Mortals, Primordial, Wildlife*     |
| **Paradox**  | *Eidolic, Forged, Occult, Primordial*        |

feats.name: Spell Scourge
feats.description_markdown:
Your training hardens your body and mind against magical harm.

- Attacks from spells or magical effects against you suffer a **–2 penalty**.
- Applies to spell attacks, magical weapon attacks, and magical trap effects.
feats.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Passive
Your training hardens your body and mind against magical harm.

- Attacks from spells or magical effects against you suffer a **–2 penalty**.
- Applies to spell attacks, magical weapon attacks, and magical trap effects.

feats.name: Warden Order
feats.description_markdown:
Spread out across the realms, different Wardens gather to form **Orders** to help tame the wilderness. Choose a **Warden Order** and gain the following boon:

| Order | Boon |
|---|---|
| **Aegis** | When using a Shield, add Armor Bonus to **Body** and **Mind** defense. |
| **Inquisition** | Gain an additional **Tool** and **V.I.T.A.L.S.** proficiency. Roll with **Resolve** on Scan and **Intuition** or **Awareness** Skill Checks with **Mortals**. |
| **Severance** | +Tier to attack/damage vs Magical targets. On a **Critical Hit**, the target's next Cast a Spell is made with Strain until end of your next turn. |
| **Thorns** | Once per turn, when a target in your Engagement uses Disengage, make an attack roll with your Bound Armament. On hit, deal damage equal to your Spellcasting Modifier; target cannot Dash until end of your next turn. |
| **Veil** | Learn *Protection from the Inhuman*. Roll with **Resolve** on Scan and **Intuition** or **Awareness** Skill Checks with **Eidolic** or **Occult**. |
feats.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Passive
Spread out across the realms, different Wardens gather to form **Orders** to help tame the wilderness.

feats.name: Spellcasting
feats.description_markdown:
You have enough understanding of magic to be able to wield it. Gain access to actions and spells that require spellcasting.

- You are a **Half-caster**
- Your **source** is **Mana**
- Your **Spellcasting Modifier** is **Mind**
- Total **reservoir** = *(1 × Tier) + Spellcasting Modifier*
- **Prepared spells** = Spellcasting Modifier
- **Spell DC** = 10 + Spell Tier + Spellcasting Modifier
- Each **Respite** restores spell points equal to your Spellcasting Modifier (minimum 3)
- You gain **three Cantrips** from the Warden source list
feats.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Passive
You have enough understanding of magic to be able to wield it.

feats.name: Arcane Shelter
feats.description_markdown: You have an innate resistance to **Magical** damage. When you take damage from **Magical** types, once per turn you have **resistance** to that damage.
feats.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Trigger | **Cost** -
You have an innate resistance to **Magical** damage. When you take damage from **Magical** types, once per turn you have **resistance** to that damage.

feats.description_markdown:
To find the source of magic you chose to study and dedicate your life to it. You choose a **Sphere of Magic** and gain access to those spells, and the following spell added to your **known spells** (except spells which require an **Creed**).

| Sphere            | Spell                 |
| ----------------- | --------------------- |
| **Aberration**    | *Resonant Distortion* |
| **Augmentation**  | *Fleet Footing*       |
| **Conjuration**   | *Imbue with Elements* |
| **Decimation**    | *Seeking Bolt*        |
| **Divination**    | *Detect the inhumane* |
| **Mortification** | *Torment*             |
| **Reclamation**   | *Healing Word*        |

feats.name: Watcher's Gaze
feats.description_markdown:
Once per **respite**, you analyze a creature within **close** range, and can choose to learn two of the following 
- Does it have a **resistance**
- Does it have a **immunity**
- Does it have a **weakness**
- What is its weakest **defense**

Against this target, you deal an additional **1d4 damage** on your attacks until the end of the skirmish.
feats.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Utility | **Cost** 1 AP

feats.name: Mystic Charge
feats.description_markdown:
You propel yourself forward with a surge of **arcane** energy.

- You gain **Dash**.
- If you to enter a new **engagement**, your **next attack this turn** deals an additional **1d8 arcane** damage.

feats.name: Mana Strike

activation.raw: 1 AP + Reservoir equal to the spell’s tier

feats.description_markdown:
You channel magical power into your **Bound Armament**, storing an **offensive spell** within it.
- You must pay the spell’s **Reservoir** cost when storing it.
- When you hit a target with your Bound Armament, you may **unleash the stored spell** against that target.    
- If the spell has an **area of effect**, it instead affects **only the chosen target**.
- Power Strike **does not** effect the spell stored in the Bound Armament

The spell dissipates if not used by the end of the skirmish.
feats.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Narrative | **Cost** 1 AP + Reservoir equal to the spell’s tier

- You must pay the spell’s **Reservoir** cost when storing it.

- If the spell has an **area of effect**, it instead affects **only the chosen target**.
- Power Strike **does not** effect the spell stored in the Bound Armament

The spell dissipates if not used by the end of the skirmish.

feats.name: Spell Rancor
feats.description_markdown: You deploy a violent field of unstable arcane energy. For the next minute, when you **Cast A Spell**, use **Mana Strike**, or use a **magic item**, your next **Weapon Strike** made with your **Bound Armament** costs **1 less AP** (minimum 1 AP).

feats.name: Spell Parry

activation.raw: Reservoir equal to the spell’s Tier
notes: Reservoir equal to the spell’s Tier

feats.description_markdown:
When a **spell** targets or affects you, you may raise your **Bound Armament** to intercept the arcane force.

Reduce the spell’s damage by: 
- ***Spellcasting Modifier** + (**Tier** × 3) + (2 × **Spell Tier**)*

If this reduces the damage to **0**, you ignore any secondary or additional effects of the spell.

You also gain proficiency with **shields**.
feats.raw_markdown:
**Path Investment** *2 Vanguard Feats*
**Trait** Trigger | **Cost** Reservoir equal to the spell’s **Tier**

feats.name: Gateway Surveyor
feats.description_markdown:
Your connection to the weave of magic allows you to detect magical anomalies, weak points between realms, or ancient arcane structures. When traveling or exploring, you may make a **lore (Arcane)** check to identify any of the following
- Hidden magical effects, lingering spell energy, or magical traps
- The presence of a **portal**, **teleportation**, or **realm travel**
- Whether an area has been recently warped by **spheres of magic** you are studied in.
In addition, you gain access to the magic sphere of **Divination**.

**Trait** Passive

feats.name: Remnant Warrior
feats.description_markdown:
You have learned remnants of arcane power to enhance your equipment beyond the traditional methods of augmentation. As part of your **daily preparations** you imbue **remnants** onto eligible items up to your **Tier**, and these do not take an augmentation slot. You choose one **remnant** to learn
- **Chaotic** (*Accessory*) When you are below half **vitality** or half **wounds**, on **attack rolls** or **skill checks** rolls you may re-roll 1s once.
- **Disruption** (*Weapon*) Once per **target**, when you hit a **spellcaster**, their next **spell attack** is rolled with **Strain**.
- **Dissipation** (*Accessory/Weapon*) Once per **rest**, when a spell of equal **Tier** or less targets you, you may use your **maneuver** to collapse the effect—rolling the warden's **mind** vs caster’s **DC**, on success, the spell fizzles.
- **Glint** (*Armor/Accessory*) Once per **respite**, reduce any damage by 1d12 and teleport 1 zone **away**.
- **Prism** (*Armor/Shield*) Once per **respite**, when you take **elemental** damage you gain **resistance** to that element until the end of your next turn, and may deal 2d4 of that **element** on your next attack.
- **Phoenix** (*Armor/Weapon*) Once per **day**, when you receive damage and gain **Wounds**, reduce the damage to **0** and drop to 1 **vitality** instead.
feats.raw_markdown:
**Path Investment** *3 Vanguard Feats*
**Trait** Passive
You have learned remnants of arcane power to enhance your equipment beyond the traditional methods of augmentation. As part of your **daily preparations** you imbue **remnants** onto eligible items up to your **Tier**, and these do not take an augmentation slot. You choose one **remnant** to learn

- **Dissipation** (*Accessory/Weapon*) Once per **rest**, when a spell of equal **Tier** or less targets you, you may use your **maneuver** to collapse the effect—rolling the warden's **mind** vs caster’s **DC**, on success, the spell fizzles.
- **Glint** (*Armor/Accessory*) Once per **respite**, reduce any damage by 1d12 and teleport 1 zone **away**.
- **Prism** (*Armor/Shield*) Once per **respite**, when you take **elemental** damage you gain **resistance** to that element until the end of your next turn, and may deal 2d4 of that **element** on your next attack.
- **Phoenix** (*Armor/Weapon*) Once per **day**, when you receive damage and gain **Wounds**, reduce the damage to **0** and drop to 1 **vitality** instead.

feats.name: Familiar Weapon
feats.description_markdown:
Your encounters and familiarity with magic has caused your **Bound Armament** to gain it's own autonomy. It can float next you at all times not counting as being held, and cannot travel further than 5ft/1.5m away. You can command with **1 AP** to:
- Make an attack once per turn
- Stow your weapon in an void pocket concealing it completely
- To summon it back from the void
